languages.text: {n}Недра корабля оглашаются тревожным воем. Спустя пару минут Мастер Вокса докладывает, что все до единого {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеры{/g} на корабле впали в странный безмолвный транс, и их жизненные силы стремительно угасают.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Недра корабля оглашаются тревожным воем. Спустя пару минут Мастер Вокса докладывает, что все до единого {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеры{/g} на корабле впали в странный безмолвный транс, и их жизненные силы стремительно угасают.{/n}

languages.text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Недра корабля оглашаются тревожным воем. Спустя пару минут Мастер Вокса докладывает, что все до единого {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеры{/g} на корабле впали в странный безмолвный транс, и их жизненные силы стремительно угасают.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

{n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single psyker on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

{n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single psyker on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

languages.text: {n}虚無船の内部を、不気味な唸り声で満たす。数分後、ヴォックス・マスターは、船上のすべてのサイカーが奇妙な静かな恍惚状態に陥り、生命力が急速に衰えていることを報告する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single psyker on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}虚無船の内部を、不気味な唸り声で満たす。数分後、ヴォックス・マスターは、船上のすべてのサイカーが奇妙な静かな恍惚状態に陥り、生命力が急速に衰えていることを報告する。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un aullido alarmante resuena en el interior de la nave del vacío. Minutos después, la maestra de vocos informa de que todos los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquico{/g}s de la nave han entrado en un extraño trance silencioso. Sus constantes vitales han emprendido un rápido declive.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un aullido alarmante resuena en el interior de la nave del vacío. Minutos después, la maestra de vocos informa de que todos los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquico{/g}s de la nave han entrado en un extraño trance silencioso. Sus constantes vitales han emprendido un rápido declive.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一阵警报的尖啸在虚空舰内部回荡。几分钟后，音阵大师报告称，舰上所有的{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}都陷入了一种诡异的静默恍惚状态，而他们的生命力正在急速流逝。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一阵警报的尖啸在虚空舰内部回荡。几分钟后，音阵大师报告称，舰上所有的{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}都陷入了一种诡异的静默恍惚状态，而他们的生命力正在急速流逝。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein alarmierendes Heulen hallt durch die Eingeweide des Raumschiffs. Einige Minuten später meldet die Voxmeisterin, dass sämtliche {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} an Bord in eine seltsame Trance verfallen sind und ihre Lebensenergie rasch schwindet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein alarmierendes Heulen hallt durch die Eingeweide des Raumschiffs. Einige Minuten später meldet die Voxmeisterin, dass sämtliche {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} an Bord in eine seltsame Trance verfallen sind und ihre Lebensenergie rasch schwindet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Uçsuz gemisinin derinliklerinde endişe verici bir uluma yankılanıyor. Birkaç dakika sonra Voks Üstadı, gemideki her bir {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerin{/g} tuhaf, sessiz bir transa girdiğini ve yaşam güçlerinin hızla solduğunu bildiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Uçsuz gemisinin derinliklerinde endişe verici bir uluma yankılanıyor. Birkaç dakika sonra Voks Üstadı, gemideki her bir {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerin{/g} tuhaf, sessiz bir transa girdiğini ve yaşam güçlerinin hızla solduğunu bildiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un hurlement alarmant résonne dans les entrailles du vaisseau. Quelques minutes plus tard, la maîtresse-vox vous signale que tous les {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g}s à bord ont sombré dans une espèce de transe silencieuse et qu'ils semblent comme drainés de leur force vitale.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An alarming howl echoes through the bowels of the voidship. A few minutes later, the Vox Master reports that every single {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g} on the ship has fallen into a strange silent trance, and their life forces are rapidly fading.{/n}

Quelques minutes plus tard, la maîtresse-vox vous signale que tous les {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psyker{/g}s à bord ont sombré dans une espèce de transe silencieuse et qu'ils semblent comme drainés de leur force vitale.{/n}
